About Us

A Cut Above
the Rest

Getting that exquisite haircut that makes you stand out in the crowd is what you can expect with every trip to Unique Cuts. We are a family-oriented Dominican barbershop proudly serving Cypress, TX since 2020.

Our highly trained staff specializes in a wide array of cuts for men, women, and children — always executed with precision, care, and style. Come in, sit back, and enjoy a complimentary soda or water while we work our magic.

✦
Walk-ins welcome — no appointment needed
✦
Complimentary drinks for every client
✦
Serving men, women & children of all ages
✦
Accepts credit cards, Apple Pay & cash
What We Offer

Our Services

Book a Service
01
Men's Haircut
A precision cut tailored to your style. Clean lines, sharp fades, and a finish that turns heads — every single time.
From $40 · 40 min
02
Kids Haircut
Patient, gentle, and skilled with children ages 1–17. We make every kid feel comfortable and leave looking fresh.
$35 · 35 min
03
Haircut + Beard
The full package. A sharp haircut paired with a perfectly shaped beard for a complete, polished look.
$50 · 45 min
04
Beard Shaping
A clean, defined beard line that frames your face. Precise edging and sculpting for a well-groomed finish.
From $20 · 30 min
05
Head Shave
A smooth, luxurious head shave with a hot towel treatment — the ultimate in clean, confident style.
$50 · 45 min
06
Women's Haircut
Versatile cuts for women of every hair type and style preference. Length varies, quality never does.
From $40 · 45 min
The Unique Cuts Difference

Why Choose Us

01
Dominican Expertise
Our barbers are trained in the Dominican tradition — known worldwide for clean fades, precise lines, and meticulous attention to detail.
02
Family-Friendly Atmosphere
We welcome the whole family — from toddlers to grandparents. A warm, welcoming environment where everyone feels at home.
03
Flexible Scheduling
Open 7 days a week with extended Friday and Saturday hours. Walk-ins always welcome, or book online at your convenience.
04
Community Rooted
Proudly serving the Cypress community since 2020. Your neighborhood barbershop — where regulars are family.
